suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'minHeight', 'placeholder', and 'value'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [language, minHeight, placeholder, readOnly, value]

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: The 'safeTabs' conditional could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 46) change on every render. Move it inside the useMemo callback. Alternatively, wrap the initialization of 'safeTabs' in its own useMemo() Hook.
